Module c868final
Package com.ogborn.c868final.DAO

Class AppointmentDAO

java.lang.Object
com.ogborn.c868final.DAO.AppointmentDAO
public class AppointmentDAO extends Object
handles database access and operations dealing with appointments

  • Method Details

    • getAllAppointments

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Appointment> getAllAppointments()
      get all appointments in the database
      Returns:
      the list of appointments

    • getWeeklyAppointments

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Appointment> getWeeklyAppointments() throws Exception
      gets all database appointments that are within the current week
      Returns:
      the list of appointments this week
      Throws:
      Exception - an exception if one is thrown

    • getNext7DaysAppointments

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Appointment> getNext7DaysAppointments() throws Exception
      gets a list of all the appointments in the next 30 days. SQL WEEK(CURRDATE()) describes week different than I understand week, so I've included both
      Returns:
      the list of appointments
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception thrown

    • getMonthlyAppointments

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Appointment> getMonthlyAppointments() throws Exception
      gets all database appointments that are within the current month
      Returns:
      the list of appointments this month
      Throws:
      Exception - an exception if one is thrown

    • getNext30DaysAppointments

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<Appointment> getNext30DaysAppointments() throws Exception
      gets a list of all the appointments in the next 30 days. SQL MONTH(CURRDATE()) describes month different than I understand month, so I've included both
      Returns:
      the list of appointments
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception thrown

    • addAppointment

      public static void addAppointment(String title, String description, String location, String type, Timestamp startDate, Timestamp endDate, int customerID, int userID, int contactID) throws SQLException, Exception
      adds a new appointment to the database
      Parameters:
      title - the appointment title
      description - the appointment description
      location - the location of the meeting
      type - the type of appointment
      startDate - the start date and time
      endDate - the end date and time
      customerID - the customer for which the appointment will discuss
      userID - the company rep assigned to the appointment
      contactID - the contact with whom we will be meeting
      Throws:
      SQLException - handling for sql exceptions
      Exception - handling for everything else

    • updateAppointment

      public static void updateAppointment(String title, String description, String location, String type, Timestamp startDate, Timestamp endDate, int customerID, int userID, int contactID, int appointmentID) throws SQLException, Exception
      updates an existing appointment within the database
      Parameters:
      title - the appointment title
      description - the appointment description
      location - the location of the meeting
      type - the type of appointment
      startDate - the start date and time
      endDate - the end date and time
      customerID - the customer for which the appointment will discuss
      userID - the company rep assigned to the appointment
      contactID - the contact with whom will be meeting
      appointmentID - the id of the appointment being updated
      Throws:
      SQLException - handling for sql exceptions
      Exception - handling for everything else

    • deleteAppointment

      public static void deleteAppointment(int appointmentID) throws SQLException, Exception
      deletes an appointment from the database
      Parameters:
      appointmentID - the appointment to be deleted
      Throws:
      SQLException - error talking to the database
      Exception - catch all for anything else

    • getAppointmentTypes

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<String> getAppointmentTypes() throws SQLException
      gets all different appointment types
      Returns:
      the list of appointment types
      Throws:
      SQLException - if sql error

    • getMonthTypeCount

      public static int getMonthTypeCount(int selectedMonth, String selectedType) throws Exception
      Retrieves the count of appointments for a given month and type. Converts the localized month name to its numeric value for database queries.
      Parameters:
      selectedMonth - The localized month name selected by the user.
      selectedType - The type of appointment to filter by.
      Returns:
      The count of matching appointments.
      Throws:
      Exception - If a database error occurs.

    • checkForConflictingAppointments

      public static Boolean checkForConflictingAppointments(Appointment appointment) throws SQLException, Exception
      checks if a new appointment overlaps with an existing one. Additional logic provided to exclude current appointment from the check, i.e. an appointment does not conflict with itself this can be checked in the following ways as used here. The SQL is hard to read, so I've explained it. the new appointment starts before but ends during an existing appointment (appointment.getStart() <= Start AND appointment.getEnd() > Start) the new appointment starts during an existing appointment (appointment.getStart() >= Start AND appointment.getStart() < End) Customer_ID = appointment.getCustomerID() ensures we are only checking against the current customer's other appointments Appointment_ID <> appointment.getAppointmentId() excludes current appointment from the check; SQL uses <> instead of !=
      Parameters:
      appointment - the new (appointment to be scheduled) to be checked
      Returns:
      false if no conflict exists, or true if one does
      Throws:
      SQLException - to handle any sql exceptions
      Exception - to handle any other exceptions

    • deleteAllAppointmentsForCustomer

      public static void deleteAllAppointmentsForCustomer(int customerId) throws SQLException
      Deletes all appointments for a specific customer from the database.
      Parameters:
      customerId - The ID of the customer whose appointments are to be deleted.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.
